description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build that runs on push to main and develop branches, on pull requests to those branches, and can be triggered manually or by another workflow. The workflow has three jobs: build, validate, and automerge. The build job runs on a matrix of OS and Python versions, checks out the code, sets up Python, installs dependencies with make install, and runs tests with make test. The validate job uses a reusable workflow from alexdlaird/pyngrok. The automerge job auto-approves and merges Dependabot PRs.
